name: Electronic Shop Simulator
short_description: Manage your own electronics store, buy phones, laptops, and accessories. Place products on stands, set prices, satisfy customers, and increase your profits. A detailed business simulation with real-time management and investment systems.
detailed_description:
Electronic Shop Simulator is a business simulation game where you establish and manage your own electronics store. Increase customer satisfaction, maximize your profits, and expand your store by offering phones, laptops, and accessories for sale. You have complete control over everything from stand placement to product pricing!

Packed with detailed systems like crypto investments, billboards, and evolving store management over time, this experience offers ideal gameplay for both strategy and simulation enthusiasts.

  • Automatic Pricing: Activate automatic pricing on the product price screen and enter a percentage. This number is not the item's price, but the average of the item's minimum and maximum selling prices.

  • Moving Items from Top to Bottom Inventory: You can do this in three ways: by drag-and-drop, with CTRL + left-click, or by pressing the colorful flash icon on the inventory screen.

  • Automatic Cashier: Upgrade your cashier's level from the store to add the automatic cashier feature and free yourself from standing at the counter.

  • Quick but Important Tips: If your store's star rating is low, the number of customers will decrease. In such a case, increase your customer count by selling products cheaper, buying reviews (green star on the reviews screen), or advertising on the Store screen. You can even do all three for a much higher customer influx.

  • Fast Progression: If you want to develop your store quickly and earn money fast, my advice is not to constantly sell very cheap accessories. Instead, sell phones or laptops, or if you prefer selling accessories, opt for expensive ones. This way, your earnings will increase much faster.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Russian, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian
